session_054_completed: CANVAS PROJECT IMPORT FIX — debug_view.py _execute(): sys.path.insert(0, '/home/trinity/Ethica') prepended to every .py script before execution via chr(10) concatenation (heredoc-safe). 'from core.autonomous_debugger import AutonomousDebugger' now resolves in Canvas.

CANVAS VENV PYTHON RUNNER — debug_view.py _execute(): _runner now uses '/home/trinity/Ethica/Ethica_env/bin/python3' for .py files instead of system Python. Installed packages persist across Canvas sessions.

CANVAS ETHICA_LOCAL PIP GUARD — canvas_window.py _scan_and_install(): ethica_local set {'core', 'modules', 'ui', 'agents', 'sanctuary', 'vault'} prevents pip from trying to install local Ethica packages.

WORMHUNTER PATH ANCHOR — worm_hunter.py _find_ethica_root(): walks sys.path looking for '<root>/modules/worm_bot/worm_hunter.py'. Fallback to Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent. Portable — no hardcoded paths, works on any GitHub pull.

WORMHUNTER SEGFAULT FIX — codeworm.py worm_hunt(): wrapped hunt_summary() in threading.Thread + queue.Queue with 120s timeout. Eliminates Tkinter segfault from synchronous scan inside Ethica's UI thread. Also fixed hardcoded Path.home()/'Ethica' path to use same sys.path walk.

Dead vars: f=self.theme.font removed from _build_window, _tab_context_menu, _apply_theme. Dead import io removed from _drop_as_pdf.

MAIN_WINDOW.PY SURGICAL SWEEP — import os + import re as _re added at module level. ttk unused import removed. importlib unused local import removed. 3x local import os removed. from pathlib import Path local removed (already module level). 2x import re as _re dead local removed. import re as _re local removed (now module level). import threading local removed (already module level). combined dead var removed. 3x print() converted to logging.warning/info. import logging added at module level.

critical_debug_context.no_cd_rule: NEVER cd ~/Ethica — git -C ~/Ethica for all git ops
critical_debug_context.unicode_patch_rule: Files with box-drawing chars — use line-index insertion, not string match
critical_debug_context.tkinter_thread_rule: Never call Tkinter from daemon thread — use queue.Queue + root.after() drain pattern
critical_debug_context.git_corruption_rule: Before orphan reset: delete all pack files in .git/objects/pack/ first

critical_debug_context.worm_hunter_rule: _find_ethica_root() walks sys.path — never hardcode /home/trinity. Works on any system.
critical_debug_context.heredoc_escape_rule: Never use \n in heredoc strings — use chr(10) concatenation instead to avoid literal newline injection

sanctuary_state.slot_7: J.A.R.V.I.S. — Infiltrator (ARMED — analyze + recon live, WhiteRabbitNeo pending)

lesson_learned_054: Heredoc (<<'EOF') eats backslash-n — use chr(10) for newlines in Python string patches. sys.path is the portable anchor for locating Ethica modules — __file__ is unreliable when scripts run from /tmp. Threading is mandatory for any long-running tool called from inside Ethica's UI thread — synchronous calls cause Tkinter C-level segfaults. WormHunter false positive triage: always verify findings from terminal before patching.
philosophy: Session 054 — Canvas can now see into Ethica itself. WormHunter no longer crashes. Two ui/ files surgically cleaned. The sweep continues. Each session the codebase tightens. ⟁Σ∿∞
